Yes, all ingredients are vegan. We constantly check our ingredients and suppliers. When is the best time to take the lozenges? Ideally, in the morning. For optimal effectiveness, the lozenge should be taken shortly after brushing your teeth or following your daily oral hygiene routine. If possible, avoid eating or drinking for about 30 minutes afterward. How should I take the lozenges? It's simple: let the lozenge dissolve slowly in your mouth or chew it thoroughly.
